item.title: Polish president hugs Zelensky at Ukrainian parliament
item.description: That body language. While Ukraine has been doing the heavy lifting during this war, Poland has taken in millions their refugees. This is brotherhood. Well done Poland as well.

item.dc:creator: Ngugi

item.title: Wholesome mini dump
item.description:
I've always turned towards Imgur on my low days. Today is one of them.
I have a great opportunity at hand to study abroad and work there for some time so that I and my family can have a better future.
You might be aware that it takes a good deal of money for international studies.
Unfortunately one of my relatives who said they'd support me financially have hit a roadblock and are now unable to do so.
Even with the student loan and my savings, I'm falling short of funds.
I'm not here asking anyone for a handout. I'm here to offer my services.
I'm a professional freelance website developer and I've been in this line of work for five years.
I will share the links to some of my projects below.
That being said, if you or anyone you know needs a website done, please get in touch with me.
I also offer other services like SEO, Google ads, logo designing
My recent projects: http://goamassagespa.com/ https://yognirodha.com/ https://www.eatswithmish.com/ https://wandervacations.com/ My portfolio website: https://flipcoder.in/ tl;dr : op is in need of website development work Have a nice day! :)
item.dc:creator: theFlipman

item.title: “It’s only ok if it’s my religion”
item.description: It’s so sad how biased and restrictive not to mention uncaring these people can be “Oh it’s only ok if it’s my faith” Edit:Thank you so much! My first ever time on the fp

item.title: Oklahoma
item.description: Almost forgot the sauce: https://www.businessinsider.com/oklahoma-state-rep-proposed-legislation-mandating-vasectomies-for-men-2022-5 Clearly, this bill has zero hope of passing and I wish instead of creating legislation we know will fail just to make a point, we could make bills that I dunno, actually fucking help people??
